initial_draft:
```
<my name> Player RED </my name>
<my resources> X: 25, Y: 5 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> Their counter-offer is reasonable. 1 X for 1 Y is a fair trade and will increase my Y resources. I will accept this trade. This ends the game.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> That sounds good, Player BLUE. I accept the trade! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```

iterations.feedback:
```
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and in the correct order with valid content.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting 1X for 1Y directly advances my goal of acquiring more resources, specifically increasing Y. My current Y count is 5, and this would bring it to 6.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent rejected my initial offer of 3X for 1Y, indicating they don't want to give up Y cheaply. Their counteroffer of 1X for 1Y is reasonable and likely to be accepted, avoiding a wasted turn.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason, player answer, and proposed trade are all consistent. The message also reflects the acceptance of the trade.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have made only one proposal prior to this final round and am now accepting, abiding by the proposal limit.
</critique>
```
